case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BAY EUROPEAN AUTOMOTIVE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BAY EUROPEAN AUTOMOTIVE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-30-2009 CONTINUED TO DEC-31-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BAY EUROPEAN AUTOMOTIVE DOES ONE THROUGH TEN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-30-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-15-2009
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-31-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JUL-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAY EUROPEAN AUTOMOTIVE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
